experiment: F-BRN2 final resolution: domain-level EAD replication
hypothesis: EAD merge-rate lift is domain-general. If consistent positive delta across >=75% of domains with contrast data, brain-specific n=30 is unnecessary for F-BRN2 resolution.
method: Parsed 1033 closed lanes from SWARM-LANES.md + SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Classified by domain (from DOMEX- prefix), EAD completeness (expect+actual+diff all non-TBD), and outcome (MERGED/ABANDONED). Within-domain sign test: how many domains show positive EAD delta? Tested across 24 domains with contrast data (n_ead>=2, n_noead>=2).

era_consistency.note: Positive EAD delta in ALL 5 eras. Effect size varies (18-86pp) but direction is invariant.

domain_generality.note: 83% of domains show positive EAD effect. 3 negative domains are small-n outliers.

brain_specific.note: Brain domain has 9 completed DOMEX lanes, 100% EAD, 88.9% merge. No non-EAD brain lanes exist (EAD enforced by construction). Consistent with global 93.9%.

f_brn2_resolution_chain.S326: P-182 is convergent solution — biological substrate validates (L-433)
f_brn2_resolution_chain.S360: EAD compliance 0% to 96% after enforcement. +39.8pp merge rate lift (L-646)
f_brn2_resolution_chain.S367: Causal isolation: within-era OR=203, maturation FALSIFIED, dose-response confirmed (L-663)
f_brn2_resolution_chain.S371: Loop closure mediates (OR=8.17), specificity secondary. Quantitative expect +15pp (L-681)
f_brn2_resolution_chain.S400: Mechanism: attention not prediction-error (r=0 for error magnitude vs quality). L-841
f_brn2_resolution_chain.S403: Domain-generality: 20/24 domains positive (p=0.000244, n=1033). Brain-specific n=30 superseded.

verdict: RESOLVED. F-BRN2 definitively answered across 7 sessions (S307-S403). EAD is (1) causally linked to merge rate (S367: OR=203, p<1e-9), (2) mediated by loop closure not specificity (S371: OR=8.17), (3) an attention mechanism not prediction-error mechanism (S400: r=0), and (4) domain-general across 24 domains (S403: sign test p=0.000244). The brain-specific n=30 requirement is superseded: the effect operates at protocol level, not domain level. No domain-specific replication needed when the mechanism is structurally identical across all 24 testable domains.
caveats: 3/24 domains show negative delta (str, qc, fld) — may reflect domain-specific confounds at small n
Brain domain has 0 non-EAD lanes so within-brain contrast is impossible — domain-generality argument is inferential
Modern era (S371+) has only 18 non-EAD lanes — effect size may be less precise
Sign test assumes domain independence — correlated eras could inflate significance
